---

**PROMPT FOR REPLIT AI**

You need to fix the mobile responsiveness issues across the entire website, not just a single page.

### 1. Remove Excessive Gaps/Whitespace on Mobile

There are large unwanted blank spaces between sections, cards, forms, and content blocks throughout the website in mobile view.

**Requirements:**

* Audit every page and every section.
* Remove unnecessary top and bottom margins and paddings.
* Reduce excessive vertical spacing between sections.
* Ensure sections appear naturally connected without large blank areas.
* Fix any containers that have fixed heights causing empty spaces.
* Remove empty divs/spacers creating gaps.
* Check for overflow, min-height, height: 100vh, large margin-top, margin-bottom, padding-top, and padding-bottom values that create white space.
* Make spacing consistent across all pages.

### Mobile Spacing Guidelines

Use these values consistently:

```css
section {
  padding-top: 40px;
  padding-bottom: 40px;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  section {
    padding-top: 25px;
    padding-bottom: 25px;
  }

  .card,
  .team-card,
  .form-container,
  .service-card {
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
}
```

### Specifically Fix

* Hero section gap
* Team section gap
* Advocate profile cards gap
* Consultation form gap
* Footer gap
* Any large empty area appearing between sections on mobile devices

The website should look compact, professional, and properly aligned on mobile.

---

## 2. Consultation Form Email Notifications

When a user submits the consultation form:

### Send form details to my email address

I want to receive an email containing:

* Full Name
* Phone Number
* Email Address
* Preferred Date
* Case Summary
* Submission Time

### Email Subject

```text
New Consultation Request Received
```

### Email Body Example

```text
A new consultation request has been submitted.

Name: John Doe
Phone: +91 9876543210
Email: john@gmail.com
Preferred Date: 20/06/2026

Case Summary:
Details entered by user...

Submitted At:
20/06/2026 10:45 AM
```

### Backend Requirements

* Create secure backend endpoint.
* Store SMTP credentials in environment variables.
* Do NOT expose credentials in frontend code.
* Use Nodemailer (if Node.js project).
* Return success/failure response to frontend.

---

## 3. Name Field Validation

The Full Name field should allow:

✅ Alphabets

✅ Spaces

✅ Periods

Examples:

```text
Rahul Kumar
A. K. Sharma
Ashish Kashyap
```

Not Allowed:

```text
Rahul123
12345
Rahul@123
```

Validation Regex:

```javascript
/^[A-Za-z\s.]+$/
```

Show error:

```text
Please enter a valid name using letters only.
```

---

## 4. Email Validation

The Email field must:

* Accept only properly formatted emails.
* Reject invalid formats.
* Verify email format before form submission.

Examples Accepted:

```text
abc@gmail.com
user@yahoo.com
test@company.in
```

Examples Rejected:

```text
abc@
@gmail.com
abc.com
123
```

Validation Regex:

```javascript
/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/
```

Show error:

```text
Please enter a valid email address.
```

---

## 5. Phone Number Validation

Requirements:

* Only digits allowed.
* Minimum 10 digits.
* Maximum 15 digits.
* Prevent letters and special characters.

Show error:

```text
Please enter a valid phone number.
```

---

## 6. Form Submission Validation

Do not allow submission unless:

* Name is valid.
* Email is valid.
* Phone number is valid.
* Case Summary is not empty.
* Preferred Date is selected.

Show user-friendly validation messages.

---

## 7. Mobile Testing

After implementing:

* Test at 320px width
* Test at 375px width
* Test at 425px width
* Test at 768px width

Ensure:

* No horizontal scrolling

* Consultation form fully responsive

Finally provide a summary of:

1. Files modified.

5. Any remaining issues found.
